channel.title: Navya EdTech — Blog
channel.description: Insights on web development, performance, e-commerce, and business systems from the Navya EdTech team.

item.title: Why Your Business Needs a Fast Website in 2026
item.author: Navya EdTech
item.description: Speed is no longer a nice-to-have. Here is how page performance directly shapes trust, conversions, and search ranking.
